summary: Blog CMS end-to-end testing (backend + frontend). 14/14 backend tests passed covering JWT auth on /api/blog-admin, public list/by-slug filtering of drafts, full CRUD, slug uniqueness, image upload (base64 PNG), unsupported MIME rejection, admin draft visibility. Frontend public /blog renders 3-column grid (data-testid=blog-grid) with blog-card-<slug>, pagination hidden when posts<=12, /blog/:slug page includes BlogPosting JSON-LD schema + canonical link, /blog/non-existent-slug shows blog-post-not-found state with Back to blog. Admin /admin → Blog tab → BlogManager → New post → BlogEditor flow works: slug auto-populates from title, TipTap toolbar present, Bold button wraps selection in <strong>, all required field testids present.

issues: TipTap warns 'Duplicate extension names found: [link]' on every editor mount — the StarterKit already registers a link extension; remove the explicit Link import or disable starterKit.link to avoid duplicate registration
Console error on every page: ipapi.co/json/ blocked by CORS. The IP geolocation call is firing client-side without a CORS proxy. Consider proxying through backend or removing if not used

action_items: (Minor) Fix TipTap duplicate 'link' extension warning in TipTapEditor.js — either remove explicit Link import or configure StarterKit({ link: false })
(Minor) ipapi.co CORS error appears on every page load; move geolocation to backend or remove the client call
critical_code_review_comments: Backend validates image MIME and returns proper 400 + clear error for image/svg+xml (good)
Public /api/blog correctly excludes draft posts in both list and by-slug responses (404 for drafts)
Admin endpoints return content_html and cover_image_url as data URLs; payload sizes acceptable for tested 1x1 PNG
Slug uniqueness enforced on create with 400 + 'slug already in use' message

Cover/OG image picker testIds use prefix pattern (e.g. blog-editor-cover-pick, blog-editor-cover-clear). The review request mentioned bare 'blog-editor-cover' which does not exist but the picker is functional — non-blocking
TipTap editor renders all expected toolbar testids (tiptap-bold verified; toolbar present)
Sonner toast on save draft uses portal rendering and is short-lived; not easily asserted from DOM scan but underlying API call succeeds (verified separately via backend tests)

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all data-testids and flows verified; toast text not DOM-asserted due to Sonner portal)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed posts and self-cleanup via DELETE; only seed 'hello-orgainse-blog' remains after run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog CMS is fully working both backend and frontend. The only outstanding warnings are: (1) TipTap duplicate 'link' extension console warning, (2) ipapi.co CORS error visible on every page (pre-existing global issue, not blog-specific). Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_blog_cms.py; run with `pytest backend/tests/test_blog_cms.py -v`. One smoke-test post 'hello-orgainse-blog' is seeded in DB.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in the blog CMS feature. The TipTap duplicate link warning is cosmetic: StarterKit ships with a link mark; importing @tiptap/extension-link separately causes a name collision. Fix: pass `link: false` to StarterKit.configure() or remove the standalone Link import.
